title: Rasmalai cake, no eggs, ordered from Westmead. Pickup at 10pm.
summary:
Rasmalai. Mango. Butterscotch. 15 flavours — 0 eggs. Not in the sponge, not in the buttercream, not once.

If you're ordering from Westmead, Merrylands, or Granville and need a cake that's genuinely eggless for your whole table — vegetarian, Jain, or halal-friendly — this is why Harris Park families have ordered from us since 2019.

Six sizes from 6-inch (serves 6–8, from $39.99) to 16-inch (serves 50–55). Any design. Photo references welcome. 48-hour notice required. Open until 10pm daily. Wigram Street, Harris Park — less than 10 minutes from Merrylands or Westmead.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725. We speak Hindi and Gujarati.
keywords: custom eggless cake Westmead Merrylands Granville
halal-friendly vegetarian Jain cake Western Sydney no eggs
